component.name: Page tabs
component.description: Three-segment pill control (345×44.5): track `Foundation/Surface/Subtle`, `Spacing/4` inset; each segment `Typography/LABEL`, `Spacing/12` vertical padding, pill radius. Active segment `Foundation/Surface/Default` + `Foundation/Text/Primary`; inactive `Foundation/Surface/Subtle` (flush with track) + `Foundation/Text/Secondary`. Center column always carries light elevation shadow per file.

variants.Job Left | Middle | Right: Preset copy All / Open / Paid with selection on first, second, or third tab.
variants.Earnings Left | Middle | Right: Preset copy This week / This month / This year.
